reviews.comment:
Los muchachos de la estacion de servicio, son 10 puntos. Le ponen alma y vida. En el lubri y el taller tambien. La calidad humana es exelente. Por parte de la administración deja muchonque desear. Y ensima ahora no habre el full los dias domingos.

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the gas station are fantastic. They put their heart and soul into it. The same goes for the lube and the repair shop. Their customer service is excellent. Management, however, leaves much to be desired. And to top it all off, they're no longer open on Sundays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRdjg3cmR3EAE
